message:
feat(e2e,testkit): integrate session transcript lifecycle into e2e runner and improve test fixtures

Major expansion of the fcp-e2e binary to support typed session transcripts
as a first-class artifact in the end-to-end testing pipeline:

- Add --session-transcript CLI flag for loading JSON session transcripts
- Implement load_session_transcript() with structured error reporting
- Add effective_run_id() and effective_scenario_id() to inherit IDs from
  transcript metadata when not explicitly provided via CLI
- Implement session_assertions() to extract pass/fail counts from transcript
  summary, using saturating arithmetic and u32::try_from for safe conversion
- Add append_session_transcript_logs() to emit per-step and summary log
  entries from transcript data with correct phase/level classification
- Implement persist_session_transcript_artifact() which serializes the
  transcript, runs secret scanning, and optionally copies to the evidence
  bundle directory
- Add session_transcript_step_report() and session_transcript_failure()
  for structured reporting integration
- Wire transcript into build_run_report() via with_session_transcript()
- Add attach_run_context() helper for propagating run_id and scenario_id
  to log entry collections
- Add exit_message_for_run_report() for unified exit-code messaging

Also includes:
- fcp-async-core: rustfmt line wrapping in test helper
- fcp-testkit: minor formatting in database_helpers, evidence_helpers,
  fixtures, session_script, and streaming_fixture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
